core.label: CyberVinci Desktop
core.description: Desktop CyberVinci with product shell, themes, AI Chat, provider controls, Canvas, Flow, visual HTML/cshtml editing, virtual goal, virtual reasoning, playbooks, agency agents and chat-integrated Flow.

localOnlyComponents.label: AI Output Cleaner
localOnlyComponents.reason: Bundled in the full all-extensions build for local validation; excluded from smaller variants.

localOnlyComponents.label: Arena
localOnlyComponents.reason: Bundled in the full all-extensions build for local validation; excluded from smaller variants.

localOnlyComponents.label: Builder
localOnlyComponents.reason: Bundled in the full all-extensions build for local validation; excluded from smaller variants.

localOnlyComponents.label: Memory
localOnlyComponents.reason: Bundled in the full all-extensions build for local validation; excluded from smaller variants.

localOnlyComponents.label: Library
localOnlyComponents.reason: Bundled in the full all-extensions build for local validation; excluded from smaller variants.

optionalComponents.label: C# and .NET tooling
optionalComponents.description: Adds C# Kit for solution/project workflows, tests, IntelliSense-style LSP bridge, debug profiles and .NET workflow commands. Memory/Roslyn inventory is bundled only by the full all-extensions build.
runtimeRequirements: dotnet SDK on PATH for full workflow support
csharp-ls, OmniSharp, VS Code C# extension runtime or explicit workspace adapter config for full C# language-server support
Razor language-server runtime or VS Code C# extension runtime for full Razor LSP support
netcoredbg, vsdbg or explicit CoreCLR debug adapter config for F5 debugging

optionalComponents.label: Codex extension
optionalComponents.description: Adds the CyberVinci Codex sidebar/webview extension and host bridge. AI Providers stay installed in core so chat can still use provider modes without this dedicated sidebar.
runtimeRequirements: Bundled Codex webview resources or CODEX_VSCODE_EXTENSION_WEBVIEW during package build
Codex CLI/authentication configured by the user for real Codex execution
